data.name: Future Love Space Machine : Glimmer Deck
data.detailed_description:
Future Love Space Machine: Glimmer Deck is an NSFW sci-fi Character Creator and Sex Simulator.

"There is no game but what we make."

This is a creative simulator, not a game. Build your own custom character using a super configurable editor or choose from a huge variety of ready made characters, and then...

They have crazy wild ultra delicious sex, right there with you in control. Simple!

If that sounds good, read on...

Want to have sex with humans, aliens, robots, space marines, anthros, monster girls, and cyber punk babes? Just pick who you want from the characters and go for it!

Think of it as being a sci-fi erotic dollhouse, where you control what happens. Everything is fully animated and uncensored. Move the camera around to watch the scene or go into POV mode to see things from a first person view.

There's no story or puzzles or combat or anything like that to get in the way, so you're free to play with any fantasy you can conjure up. Explore a full spectrum rainbow of sexuality. LGBTQIA friendly!

FLSM comes with a bunch of characters and sex positions, and for even more variety use the included Character Editor to craft your own sci-fi sex dreams.

What do I get?

  • Character Editor to make your own incredible sexy characters

  • 22 fully animated sex positions

  • 23 awesome characters, including...

    • Cali Cali GunGun (cyber pirate)

    • Battle Damaged Hogart (space marine)

    • Molly (???)

    • Rei (bounty hunter)

    • Aliens, anthros, trans characters, robots, humans, and more!

data.short_description: Future Love Space Machine: Glimmer Deck is a sci-fi character creator and sex simulator. With aliens, robots, humans, and more, all LGBTQIA+ friendly. Plus there's a space cat, so there's that.
data.reviews:
“Future Love Space Machine is original, erotic, easy to use and addictive. If you like to get straight to the sex and have simple controls to get to the action then download FLSM now and try it for yourself … you’ll be sure to love it.”
94% – Adult Games News

“This game really looks like an AAA title and that's amazing! It's about opening up your mind, exploring your inner self and getting graphic about it.”
Fast Paced Reviews

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft Windows 7 or later
  • 處理器: 2.4GHz Pentium 4, Intel 1.8GHz Dual Core, or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X 11 dedicated compatible video card, 2GB VRAM
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Please note that integrated Intel video chips are not powerful enough to run this game very well.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Microsoft Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7-4790K 4 GHz Quad-Core Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Geforce GTX 1070
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Please note that integrated Intel video chips are not powerful enough to run this game very well.
